attributes.title: [RabbitMQ OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of RabbitMQ broker health: message traffic, queue depths, dropped messages, alarms, and resource utilization across nodes and queues.

This dashboard monitors RabbitMQ broker health:
- Message publish and delivery rates (traffic)
- Queue depths (ready vs unacknowledged)
- Dropped messages and memory/disk alarms (errors)
- Node resource utilization (saturation)
- Consumer counts and queue health
